response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Partially matches. 'Sweet Memories' audio is in Japanese while JSON provided English lyrics; manual transcription used for Japanese segments. 'Cobra' matches JSON perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: JSON used as a baseline for 'Cobra'. Talk segments were manually transcribed due to absence in JSON. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles tightly synchronized with vocal starts. Transitions between speakers in talk segments handled with instantaneous transitions. Visual text for song credits and TV branding included.

subtitles.original: 見えるのはなぜかしら
subtitles.english: I wonder why I can see them

subtitles.original: 過ぎ去った優しさも今は
subtitles.english: Even the kindness of the past, now...

subtitles.original: 甘い記憶
subtitles.english: Sweet memories...

subtitles.original: Sweet memories
subtitles.english: Sweet memories

subtitles.original: You are watching ERB TV!
subtitles.english: You are watching ERB TV!

subtitles.original: Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame TELEVISION
subtitles.english: [Text: Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame Television]

subtitles.original: Brilliant, Sora! That was a masterclass in elegance.
subtitles.english: Brilliant, Sora! That was a masterclass in elegance.

subtitles.original: My heart is still melting doki doki!
subtitles.english: My heart is still melting doki doki!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！ Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you!

subtitles.original: It was such a sweet time singing with everyone!
subtitles.english: It was such a sweet time singing with everyone!

subtitles.original: I get it, I get it. Sweet time, sweet memories. I see, I see.
subtitles.english: I get it, I get it. Sweet time, sweet memories. I see, I see.

subtitles.original: And the lovely Nerissa Ravencroft! You look absolutely smashing tonight!
subtitles.english: And the lovely Nerissa Ravencroft! You look absolutely smashing tonight!

subtitles.original: Oh Liz, you're such a flatterer. I was watching from the wings and I couldn't stop humming along.
subtitles.english: Oh Liz, you're such a flatterer. I was watching from the wings and I couldn't stop humming along.

subtitles.original: Oh! I have a question for you guys!
subtitles.english: Oh! I have a question for you guys!

subtitles.original: So if you two formed a unit, what would your name be?
subtitles.english: So if you two formed a unit, what would your name be?

subtitles.original: Something flashy for the '80s charts!
subtitles.english: Something flashy for the '80s charts!

subtitles.original: うーん、そうね...
subtitles.english: Hmm, well...

subtitles.original: We have something in common, don't we? Blue!
subtitles.english: We have something in common, don't we? Blue!

subtitles.original: Blue! And...
subtitles.english: Blue! And...

subtitles.original: You're kind of legendary, and I'm a demon... so me too!
subtitles.english: You're kind of legendary, and I'm a demon... so me too!

subtitles.original: How about "BLUE MEGAMISAMA"?
subtitles.english: How about "BLUE MEGAMISAMA"?

subtitles.original: つまり！ BLUE MEGAMISAMA!
subtitles.english: In other words... BLUE MEGAMISAMA!

subtitles.original: Oh! I like that! I like that a lot! Whoa! BLUE MEGAMISAMA!
subtitles.english: Oh! I like that! I like that a lot! Whoa! BLUE MEGAMISAMA!

subtitles.original: Beautiful! So cool!
subtitles.english: Beautiful! So cool!

subtitles.original: Sora, here's a question for you.
subtitles.english: Sora, here's a question for you.

subtitles.original: We all know you are an idol, but tonight you look like a movie star!
subtitles.english: We all know you are an idol, but tonight you look like a movie star!

subtitles.original: Which '80s movie would you want to star in?
subtitles.english: Which '80s movie would you want to star in?

subtitles.original: Ah... the '80s... E.T.!
subtitles.english: Ah... the '80s... E.T.!

subtitles.original: E.T.! E.T.! E.T.!
subtitles.english: E.T.! E.T.! E.T.!

subtitles.original: Oh, that's a good one! Yeah, yeah!
subtitles.english: Oh, that's a good one! Yeah, yeah!

subtitles.original: I'll get my bike and you can hop in my basket!
subtitles.english: I'll get my bike and you can hop in my basket!

subtitles.original: Nerissa, question for you!
subtitles.english: Nerissa, question for you!

subtitles.original: You've got a powerful voice! What is your favorite powerful band from the '80s?
subtitles.english: You've got a powerful voice! What is your favorite powerful band from the '80s?

subtitles.original: I don't know if I'd call them powerful... but you know the answer...
subtitles.english: I don't know if I'd call them powerful... but you know the answer...

subtitles.original: Before I even say it, it's The Smiths!
subtitles.english: Before I even say it, it's The Smiths!

subtitles.original: I've monitored you enough that I already knew the answer!
subtitles.english: I've monitored you enough that I already knew the answer!

subtitles.original: But that's still a great answer! Thank you!
subtitles.english: But that's still a great answer! Thank you!

subtitles.original: All right! I better get off and get ready for the next wild track!
subtitles.english: All right! I better get off and get ready for the next wild track!

subtitles.original: I'll leave you guys to it! Ta-ra, loves, ta-ra! Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: I'll leave you guys to it! Ta-ra, loves, ta-ra! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: You are watching ERB TV!
subtitles.english: You are watching ERB TV!

subtitles.original: All right then, let's move on to the next song, darlings!
subtitles.english: All right then, let's move on to the next song, darlings!

subtitles.original: One, two... Cobra! Huzzah!
subtitles.english: One, two... Cobra! Huzzah!

subtitles.original: コブラ
subtitles.english: [Title: Cobra]

subtitles.original: Lyrics: 冬杜花代子 / Music: 大野雄二
subtitles.english: [Lyrics: Kayoko Fuyumori / Music: Yuji Ohno]

subtitles.original: 街をつつむ Midnight fog
subtitles.english: Midnight fog surrounding the streets

subtitles.original: 孤独な Silhouette 動き出せば
subtitles.english: A lonely silhouette, once it starts moving

subtitles.original: それは まぎれもなく ヤツさ
subtitles.english: It's unmistakably him

subtitles.original: コブラ Leaving me blue
subtitles.english: Cobra, Leaving me blue

subtitles.original: コブラ Missing you true
subtitles.english: Cobra, Missing you true
